title: Image Type
text: Image Type Type of image to use as a background or icon— Glyph or File . Value Description (None) No image is used Glyph Use the specified glyph. File Use the specified file. Usage Dynamic? No Supported in Grid? No Dependencies: Image File or Background Image Map Widget For map widgets, this property defines the type of image to use as the background image on the map widget. The default is Glyph . Specify the image to use in the Image Name property. Application Shell, Form, and Default Entity Widget For application shells, forms, and entities, this property defines the type of image to use as a background image. Uniface automatically resizes the image to fit the window (subject to the Preserve Aspect Ratio property). Specify the image to use in the Background Image property. Applies to umap (Map) Application Shells Forms Entities Area Frames and Lines Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
